name: remote-server
description: SSH access to a remote server. Adds /remote command for health checks and remote command execution. Delegates to Haiku.

configPrompts.prompt: Remote server hostname or IP address (e.g. 192.168.1.100 or server.tailscale.ts.net)?
SSH username on the remote server?
Short name for this server (used in status output, e.g. 'home-server')?
